meaning: 譽ｮ蠕ｷ蜈ｰ[闍ｱ蝗ｽ闍ｱ譬ｼ蜈ｰ荳懷圏驛ｨ貂ｯ蟶﹅(謌冶ｯ第淵蠕ｷ蜈ｰ)
examples: Sunderland play their 350th Premier League match.
Nissan's car factory in Sunderland, for instance, is one of its finest anywhere.
Down the coast in Sunderland, Nissan is developing electric cars with the help of public money.
The route for the inaugural Marathon of the North that will take place in Sunderland has been revealed.
Sunderland City Council, along with Steve Cram, introduced the Sunderland City 10k to replace the Great North 10k.
